message:
fix(cli): list all available subcommands in `dcg --help` output

The custom help handler displayed usage, options, environment variables,
and blocked commands but never listed the available subcommands (doctor,
packs, test, explain, etc.). This made it impossible for users to
discover dcg's CLI capabilities from `--help` alone.

Add a COMMANDS section between OPTIONS and ENVIRONMENT that lists every
subcommand with a short description, matching the subcommand doc comments
in cli.rs. Also includes a hint to run `dcg <command> --help` for
per-command details.

Fixes #33

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
